s:Ph/Default/Type = "Geant4_Modular"
sv:Ph/Default/Modules = __PHYSICS_MODULES__
d:Ph/Default/CutForGamma = __CUT_GAMMA_MM__ mm
d:Ph/Default/CutForElectron = __CUT_ELECTRON_MM__ mm

d:Ge/World/HLY       = __WORLD_HLY_CM__ cm

s:Ge/Patient/InputDirectory = "__PATIENT_INPUT_DIR__"
s:Ge/Patient/InputFile = "__PATIENT_INPUT_FILE__"

s:Ge/Patient/ImagingToMaterialConverter = "MaterialTagNumber"
i:Ge/Patient/NumberOfVoxelsX = __XBINS__

i:Ge/Patient/NumberOfVoxelsZ = __ZBINS__
